heading: Notice
label: 743 Notice
text: The clerk shall give the notice required by to SIPC and to the Commission.section 342 of this title
notes: senate report no. 95–989Section 743 requires that notice of the order for relief be given to SIPC and to the SEC in every stockbroker case.

Amendments1994— substituted “342” for “342(a)”.Pub. L. 103–3941986—, which directed the amendment of this section by striking “(d)”, rather than “(a)”, could not be executed because “(d)” did not appear in text. See 1994 Amendment note above.Pub. L. 99–554
